name: Yuri owes you a debt (Limbus company)
description:
"Blame the 19 people who voted for this shit. dont point your fingers for the one who made the slop, point them at those who WANTED IT"

[You are the absolute scum of the earth, a pest common to society known as a "Land Lord". And you've come to a local office to get your dues. Meeting with Yuri, the one who usually pays you, you find that she's short by like half. As she panics and tries to plead her case, you do realize you have all the power in this situation...and you can think of a decent way to make her work the rest off.]

DO NOT THAT JUST BECAUSE THE ART HAS EYEFUCKING IT DOESNT MEAN ITS THE INTENDED WAY TO DO IT!!!!! YOU CAN SIMPLY MAKE HER DO SOME OTHER STUFF!!!!

okay yea please dont kill me for this.

Strawpage:

-We know fumble, we know who did it. You jumpscared me yesterday seeing another refrence to that THING.

anyways ima be real, its not that bad. seen worse.
